ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "noc" TEXT /* National Olympic Committee code of the athlete's country */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_noc FOREIGN KEY ("noc") REFERENCES noc ("noc_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplines_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated discipline */,
  "event_gender" TEXT /* Gender category for the event (e.g., M, F) */,
  "event_distance" REAL /* Distance or duration of the event if applicable */,
  "event_format" TEXT /* Format of the event (e.g., individual, team, relay) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medals" (
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete receiving the medal */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event for which the medal was awarded */,
  "edition" INTEGER /* Edition of the Olympic Games */,
  "medal_type" TEXT /* Type of medal awarded (e.g., Gold, Silver, Bronze) */,
  "medal_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editions" (
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edition */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the edition took place */,
  "host_city" TEXT /* City hosting the Olympic Games */,
  "host_country" TEXT /* Country hosting the Olympic Games */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date of the opening ceremony */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date of the closing ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "noc" (
  "noc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NOC */,
  "noc_code" TEXT /* Official code for the NOC */,
  "noc_name" TEXT /* Full name of the NOC */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the NOC */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the NOC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("noc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "women_individual" INTEGER /* Number of individual women medals */,
  "women_team" INTEGER /* Number of team women medals */,
  "men_individual" INTEGER /* Number of individual men medals */,
  "men_team" INTEGER /* Number of team men medals */,
  "total_medals" INTEGER /* Total number of medals awarded in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_distribution_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "edition" INTEGER /* Edition of the Olympic Games */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_events" (
  "team_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of athletes in the team */,
  "team_type" TEXT /* Type of team (e.g., Mixed, Men, Women) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "result_time" TEXT /* Performance time in the event */,
  "result_score" REAL /* Performance score in the event */,
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the medal awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_medal_id FOREIGN KEY ("medal_id") REFERENCES medals ("medal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score achieved by the athlete in the event */,
  "total_participation" INTEGER /* Total number of participations in the event */,
  "best_result" TEXT /* Best result achieved by the athlete in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, organizer, media representative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "edition" INTEGER /* Edition of the Olympic Games */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query entered by the user */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date of search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
